resources.string: The app runs in the background and analyzes incoming SMS for signs of fraud.
⚠️ Be careful: never share your verification code over the phone. If you suspect anything, hang up and call the BANK, Government Agencies, Police at their official number, or your Relatives.
«Display over other apps» permission is not granted — the red warning may not appear over the call screen.
Tap — the system will request several permissions one by one. Choose «Allow» for each. At the end, the «Display over other apps» screen will open — enable the toggle there.
Last step: display over other apps
Needed so the red warning appears over the call screen.
Delete all detection records from this device.
All detection records will be permanently deleted. Continue?
Nothing yet. No suspicious events detected.
Do NOT share the code by phone!
Hang up and call the bank at the official number on the back of your card.
Neither the bank, the police, nor government services EVER ask for codes by phone.
Before we start — a short agreement.
✅ Everything runs locally on your device.
📵 The content of your SMS is not sent anywhere.
📊 Only one anonymous signal is sent to the server — confirmation of accepting this agreement.
⚠️ This is an auxiliary tool, not a replacement for your vigilance.
I have read the Privacy Policy and Terms, and I accept them.
What to do if Android 15 (Samsung) blocks permissions

If the app says «no SMS permission» or «no call permission» — Android 15 protects apps installed outside the Play Store from dangerous permissions. Do this:

1. On home screen, hold the ScamGuard icon → (i) «App info».
2. In the top-right corner — three dots (⋮) → «Allow restricted settings» → enter device PIN.
3. Permissions → grant the missing ones.
Google Play Protect is blocking the app

During installation Play Protect may warn «app not verified». Tap «More details» → «Install anyway». If Play Protect blocks an already installed app: Play Store → profile → Play Protect → gear icon → «Scan apps» — turn off temporarily.
Why does the app need so many permissions?

• SMS reception — to analyze incoming messages for signs of fraud (on device, not sent anywhere).
• Phone state — to know if a call is currently active.
• Call management — allows the «Hang up» button in the notification to actually end the call.
• Display over other apps — to show the red warning over the call screen.

Everything runs locally. SMS content is not sent anywhere.
%1$d min ago you received a confirmation code
Do not share the code with anyone!
